headline.main_headline: Who will Be President? Clinton? Bush? Trump? Fiorina? Sanders? Carson? Rubio? Cruz? Your Bank Accounts Will Soon Be Confiscated Whoever Wins!
headline.subheadline: FACT: Plans are already in place for the instant confiscation of your savings and retirement Accounts. What follows is the TRUTH that no politician or banker will ever tell you. It will work like THIS... ONE: The president announces a new economic 'crisis' for our banking system. TWO: A 'bank holiday' is declared. Doors are shut. ATMs are closed. THREE: A BIG chunk of your money is confiscated in the name of 'fairness.'
headline.deck_copy: The Two Most Dangerous Words for Your Nest Egg in 2016... INCOME EQUALITY
headline.promise_compression: Election outcome doesn't matter → All candidates support income equality → Bail-ins coming → Hide money NOW

curiosity_architecture.gap_created: No matter who wins 2016 election, your bank account faces confiscation - how is this possible and what's the exact mechanism?
curiosity_architecture.specificity_depth: 3-step confiscation process detailed, Cyprus precedent ($100K threshold, 40% seizure), IMF policy paper October 2013 advocating 'capital levy', FDIC/Bank of England joint paper December 2012

lead.full_text: Enough is ENOUGH. There's a dangerous political trend that's running under the headlines and hype. It's a movement really. And it's fueled by power-hungry politicians that want to turn you into a permanent, dependent class of workers who need their blessing to stay healthy, buy a car, save a bit for retirement and maybe pass something along to your children. And this movement is being fueled by two, powerful words that are dripping with revolution for this country... not a good revolution. Clinton? Sanders? Bush? Cruz? Paul? Rubio? It doesn't matter. Not even political outsiders Trump, Fiorina or Carson are likely to stop this revolution. The MOMENT You Hear These TWO Words, Take Your Money and RUN! In the months ahead, you'll hear these two words from EVERY presidential candidate, big or small. These words were also uttered by Chairman Mao, Joseph Stalin, Fidel Castro and Hugo Chavez. The words are INCOME EQUALITY.
lead.hook_sentence: The MOMENT You Hear These TWO Words, Take Your Money and RUN!
lead.transition_to_body: These days, you can't listen to a politician without hearing these words in the first 30 seconds. Hillary is using 'income inequality' to sell herself as a 'champion for the little guy.' The Republicans are talking 'income inequality' too.
lead.emotional_progression: exhaustion → alarm → historical parallel → bipartisan betrayal

promise_architecture.failure_reframe: You haven't failed to protect your wealth because you didn't work hard enough or save enough. The government has systematically made your money vulnerable to confiscation: 1) Money in bank is legally NOT yours (it's bank's unsecured debt), 2) FDIC is complicit (joint paper with Bank of England planning bail-ins), 3) IMF officially advocates 'capital levy', 4) Cyprus already did it (40% seized), 5) ALL presidential candidates (both parties) support 'income equality' which justifies confiscation. Your instinct to distrust politicians was correct.

three_part_structure.what_they_think_problem_is: Income inequality is a political issue that politicians talk about, but my savings are protected by FDIC insurance and America would never do what banana republics do with confiscation or capital controls
three_part_structure.what_real_problem_is: ALL politicians (both parties, including 'outsiders' Trump/Fiorina/Carson) are using 'income equality' as CODE WORD to justify wealth confiscation. Cyprus ALREADY seized 40% of accounts over €100K ($108K) with 2-week 'bank holiday' (doors locked, ATMs shut). IMF issued official policy paper October 2013 advocating 'capital levy' on private wealth, calling it 'fair'. Germany's Bundesbank (2013) and ALL 27 EU countries (June 2013) approved raiding accounts to pay debts. FDIC/Bank of England joint paper (December 2012) shows plans ALREADY IN PLACE originating from G20. When crisis hits, three steps execute: 1) President declares 'banking crisis', 2) 'Bank holiday' declared (like Cyprus - doors shut, ATMs closed), 3) Accounts over $100K get 40%+ 'bail-in tax' (you lose money, get worthless bank shares). Plus: Money in bank is NOT legally yours - it's 'unsecured debt' owned by bank. US national debt is $18T with $24T in private retirement accounts. Politicians will confiscate retirement accounts (MyRA is infrastructure already in place).
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: You saved money and diversified but government systematically made it vulnerable: 1) Moved money from 'your property' to 'bank's unsecured debt' (legal seizure possible), 2) Limited your transactions (5 per month) claiming to 'help' you but really keeping money accessible for seizure, 3) Created 'MyRA' retirement account (infrastructure for nationalizing all retirement accounts), 4) FDIC has miniscule assets (can't protect $250K in real crisis, you'd be lucky to get 10% back), 5) IMF/Germany/EU openly discussing wealth confiscation as policy. Your failure to protect wealth wasn't lack of knowledge - it was government systematically removing all protections while telling you 'everything is insured'.

specimens.quote: In Cyprus, the government seized 40% of ALL savings deposits over 100,000 Euros. That's about $108,000 at the current exchange rate. When rumors started swirling, they announced a sudden 'bank holiday.' Banks closed. ATMs shut. Two days later... doors stayed closed. Next day? Closed. Day after that? Still closed. What started as a two-day bank holiday lasted for almost two weeks until the damage was done. The bail-in was done... the money was gone.

In a report that was published in October 2013, the IMF discussed strategies to help balance the budgets for countries deeply in debt. Their solution? A one-time tax on the wealthiest residents. Here's an exact quote from page 49: 'The sharp deterioration of the public finances in many countries has revived interest in a "capital levy" -- a one-off tax on private wealth -- as an exceptional measure to restore debt sustainability. The appeal is that such a tax, if it is implemented before avoidance is possible and there is a belief that it will never be repeated, does not distort behavior (and may be seen by some as fair).'

Germany's Bundesbank issued a statement in 2013: 'Countries about to go bankrupt should draw on the private wealth of their citizens through a one-off capital levy before asking other states for help.'

In June of 2013, the finance members of all 27 European Union countries approved raiding private accounts in excess of 100,000 Euros to help pay off the national debts accumulated by incompetent, corrupt politicians and their unsustainable welfare states.

A joint paper by the U.S. Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) and the Bank of England (BOE) dated December 10, 2012 shows that these plans have been long in the making, that they originated with the G20 Financial Stability Board in Basel, Switzerland, and that the result will be to deliver clear title to the banks of depositor funds.

The moment you put your money in a bank savings or checking account it is no longer your property. In legal terms, it is an 'unsecured debt' that's owned by the bank. Your bank statement and balance is basically a paper IOU.
Financial Analyst Jim Sinclair stated: 'Bail-ins are coming to North America without any doubt, and will be remembered as the Great Leveling. Not only can it happen here, but it will happen here.'

The U.S. National Debt is over $18 TRILLION. That's $56,000 for every man, woman and child. The Federal government could confiscate every penny capital (GDP) generated by every business, and every citizen and STILL not balance the books. As of 2014, there was approximately $24 trillion in United States private retirement accounts. World Net Daily reported: 'Recent evidence suggests government officials continue to eye the multi-trillion dollar private retirement savings market, including IRAs and 401(k) plans, eyeing the opportunity to redistribute private retirement savings to less affluent Americans.'

Obama's new 'MyRA' retirement account was created without congressional vote by a stroke of the pen of Barack Obama. That's never been done before. A MyRA lets you automatically deposit a portion of your paycheck in a government-managed account that invests it in government Treasuries. The return rate? Around 2% a year. That's not even close to the inflation rate, so you lose money every year. Any financial advisor who did this with your money would be jailed. But the MyRA is the first step towards nationalizing (also known as confiscating) every retirement account in America.

According to WND, the banks most likely to confiscate depositors' savings were those that accepted bail-out money during the last crisis. That includes Bank of America, Citigroup and J.P. Morgan Chase.

proof.strongest_proof_element: IMF October 2013 official policy paper (page 49) advocating 'capital levy' before depositors can avoid it + Cyprus 2013 precedent (40% seized, 2-week bank holiday) + FDIC/Bank of England joint paper December 2012 showing G20 origin + All 27 EU countries approving raid June 2013
proof.proof_sequence: Cyprus case study (how it happens) → IMF policy documentation (official approval) → Germany endorsement → EU 27-country approval → FDIC/Bank of England joint paper (US complicity) → Legal status of deposits (unsecured debt) → Expert warnings (Jim Sinclair) → Vulnerability math ($18T debt vs $24T accounts) → MyRA infrastructure (confiscation vehicle) → Bank vulnerability list (BofA, Citi, JPM)
